CustomField.label: Trail ID
CustomField.description: Unique identifier for this trail persona. Values: guided_trail · explorer_journey · trail_of_mastery · community_alumni. Used by GetTrailConfig Agentforce action to look up the correct config.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the trail identifier exactly as used in the system. Values: guided_trail, explorer_journey, trail_of_mastery, community_alumni. Must be unique — only one config record per trail.
